jcr:content.jcr:description: Challenging work. Global impact. Every day.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Why AbbVie
jcr:content.cardDescription: Challenging work. Global impact. Every day.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: See what makes us a great place to work.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Our work can—and does—have a tangible, lasting impact on millions of people. But it’s not just the results that matter. How we achieve them matters, too. Leading with purpose, we work to build a more sustainable future for generations to come. We do that by putting our expertise, resources and talent to work to make a real difference for patients, communities and our world.

block.name: Quote
block.quotation: When I go home at the end of the day, I want to say I made somebody's life better. That’s what’s kept me at AbbVie.

block.description: We believe the paths we take to achieving our breakthroughs matter. At AbbVie, every one of our ~57,000 employees is a part of shaping those paths—and defining our way forward.
block.name: Teaser
block.title: Together, we break through

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: compounds, devices or indications in development in our pipeline, individually or under collaboration or license agreement.

block_201448331.name: Video
block_201448331.overlayDescription: Employees describe our culture in three words
block_201448331.overlayHeading: Our culture, defined by our people

block.name: Custom Title
block.title: What makes you stand out, makes you perfect for AbbVie

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We value diverse perspectives, creating an inclusive culture and treating all employees with dignity and respect. When everyone can be themselves at work and when they’re treated with respect and dignity, we maximize every employee’s potential

block_2.linkText: Learn more about life at AbbVie
block_2.name: Cta

block_3.name: Custom Title
block_3.title: We're committed to equity, equality, diversity and inclusion

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: It’s critical to have an inclusive workplace with diverse viewpoints where all can thrive, because we know that collaboration, breakthrough innovation and performance happen at the intersection of diversity and inclusion.

block.imageAlt: man and woman walking down hall
block.name: Custom Image
Custom Title
block.title: We’ve been recognized across the globe as a great place to work

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: The work we do at AbbVie hasn’t gone unnoticed. We’ve been honored to receive some of the most prestigious ratings and recognitions in the industry, including being named on more than 40 workplace and diversity and inclusion lists.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Room to grow and space to thrive

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: People do their best work when they’re at their best. That's why we empower our people to be their best selves at work and at home by rewarding them with competitive benefits, compensation and well-being programs that support their needs across each stage of their life.

block.name: Custom Title
block.title: You don’t just work here, you grow here

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: No matter your role, level or background - we want you to grow and succeed. We offer learning and development programs that empower you to advance your career and achieve your personal goals.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: If you thrive as part of a diverse, collaborative team—we’re ready for you.
